svg.text: ▌ UNCLASSIFIED ▌ IRONFORGE MDMP SIMULATION — TRAINING AID ONLY ▌ NOT FOR OPERATIONAL USE ▌ UNCLASSIFIED ▌
COURSE OF ACTION DEVELOPMENT AND ANALYSIS
absorb and attrit enemy attack before
flank of committed enemy force at BP TIGER.
▸ Security force delays and IDs enemy main effort
▸ Obstacles/indirect fires channel enemy into EAs
BSA displaces forward to sustain reserve
for counterattack. FARP established at FOB.
Adjusts main effort to secondary axis
Concentrate combat power on key terrain
and integrated obstacle belts. Hold or die.
Main effort company team holds HILL 342
inside strongpoint. Water and class IX.
Use fixing force to hold enemy while
flank as they fix on obstacle belt, BP HAWK.
▸ Fixing force occupies BPs with obstacles
▸ Aviation screen/EW on avenues of approach
FLE prepositioned near striking force AA.
Fixing force occupies BPs; striking AA
Strike force attacks flank at H+4
▌ UNCLASSIFIED ▌ IRONFORGE MDMP SIMULATION — TRAINING AID ONLY ▌ NOT FOR OPERATIONAL USE ▌ UNCLASSIFIED ▌
